user.title: Add a dynamic tariff source
user.description: Configure a VSE / SmartGridready conform dynamic tariff API. The default URL is the BKW feed-in remuneration (Abnahmeverguetung).

data.name: Name
data.surcharge: Fixed surcharge per kWh (applied after VAT)
data.display_minor_unit: Display in minor unit (Rp./ct instead of CHF/EUR)

error.cannot_connect: Could not fetch or parse tariff data from this URL. Check the URL and try again.

abort.already_configured: This URL and price component combination is already configured.
